text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Over the next several days following her race, I try approaching
Narita Brian several times. However...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: There's nothing to talk about.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Scram.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
choice_data_list: She won't even give me the time of day!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Hey, it's that trainer. Pretty gutsy to come again.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
That's the most persistent one we've seen yet, huh? I'm sure Brian will
say no, just like at the tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've heard about Brian's tryout race. The tryouts are supposed to be
where racers attempt to get scouted, but she refused every offer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And when talk turns to making her debut, she abruptly leaves without another word. Maybe that's what she has a problem with...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Another few days later, I hear that Narita Brian's going to race again,
so I hurry over to see it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hraaagh!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hishiama's really fired up today! Like, we're talking a whole 'nother
level!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Well, she's the one who suggested they race, so she can't afford to
lo— Whoa! Hishiama's making her move!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna... crush you! Wraaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hup!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Wha?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Gah... Damn it! Aaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hold it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Just where do ya think you're goin'? Our battle isn't over. I challenged
you to a one-on-one, best outta three.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: And I ain't losin' again! So get ready for the next—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The outcome's already decided. You know full well that if we race
again, the results'll be the same.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to see anyone's fire go out anymore, much less extinguish
it myself. I'm... sick of it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Damn it... I know, okay? I know I can't beat you right now!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But... that doesn't mean I'm a quitter who gives up after one measly
defeat. Don't you dare go 'round assumin' you know what everyone's
like!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
choice_data_list: She's just going to challenge you again.
She's just going to challenge you again.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...You again.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Didn't I tell you to scram? Don't let me see you again.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Fine, I'll say it. Racers like that might put on a tough front, but once
their spirit's burned out, it ain't coming back.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I've seen it a hundred times. There's no point in me racing them.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It wouldn't satisfy anyone.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: (It's always been like this. Ever since back then.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: (When... I first felt this hunger.)

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hurry up, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Young Brian
text_block_list.text: Coming!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(She was always ahead of me. I felt like a wild animal on the chase,
but she never let me pass her. It was the most fun I've ever had.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(I'd run and run... I'd keep running and chasing after her... But no
matter how satisfying it felt, I only wanted more.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: (And then it happened.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crash!

text_block_list.name: Young Brian
text_block_list.text: Sis? Sis, wake up. Sis... Sis!

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Sorry, Brian.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wee woo, wee woo!
